title: Recover the Heap After Deletion of Duplicate Elements

statement.inputFormat:
Input will contain an array representing a max heap.


Example:
5
4 9 3 7 6
statement.outputFormat:
Return true if the heap is restored successfully, otherwise return false.


Example:
true
statement.notes:
Use the following constraints to optimize your solution.


**Constraints**:
1 <= n <= 10000
1 <= nums[i] <= 10000

examples.explanation:
Explanation: [5,9,7,3,6] is the original max heap
After deleting duplicates, the array is [5,9,7,6]
